raw.message: Test Yourself in an Apocalyptic Robo-War! Command Steel Giants, Crush Rivals! Survive Chaos!

hook.summary: Intense mech combat featuring a heavy-duty robot firing multiple weapons at enemies.
hook.visual_action: A black mech with a skull emblem fires cannons and missiles at enemy robots in a snowy canyon.

scene_flow: Player mech initiates heavy fire on enemy targets in a snowy mountain pass.
Continuous weapon fire and missile launches create a sense of overwhelming power.
Enemy mechs are targeted and hit, showing damage effects and UI indicators.
Screen cuts to a black background with a glowing 'JOIN NOW' call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy tactical mech combat and military-themed shooters.
